title: Run For Life Lyrics Biriyani
stanzas: <div>Run For Life Lyrics Biriyani

oru pocket biriyani
venum
aatathukku variya nee
ok
five more nimidam
neeyiruntha varum paaru
sunami
phsyco unit

machi prachana vandha oadu
hide outu shelter-a
konjam thaedu
kannuku munnukku
nikiradhu yaaru
oru plate biriyani
nala bejaaru

steadya machi oadu oadu
machi vidama
sakka podu podu
you can run machi
you can’t hide
i’m watching you now
run for your life
run for your life
run for your life
run for your life
yeah run for your life

here we go.. here we go
thappika paaru
bullet pola therikka oadu
maatuna sangu
oothum theriyumula?

escape panna nee
paathalum vazhiyilla.
ah it’s a dead end bangu
aapu kannukku theriyathu
bangu sikkikitiye
appuram nee muzhikkaatha
thappu pannitu thappika nenachu
pozhachukka machi

badboys never give chances
so don’t take one
coz you just have none huh!!
click click
bang bang bang

thambiyodu thappiyodu
thirumbi nee paakaama
biriyani kekuthaa goyyala
seiyum thappa theriyira
maathiri seiyaatha
no they will keep coming cha
so better watch out
ok take care bye machan
peace out come on

oodura nariyila
athu andha rendu nari
thaanaa naa naa naa naa

siraiyile adaicha
kizhiyum thunimani
lungi thaanaa naa naa naa naa

mallaakka paduthu
allaakka yosichu
machi nee paaru.
maatuna mavane thanni saaru
oliyira manney
 sir-u yaaru?
vedikka porandaa!

hey kazhuvura meenula
nazhuvura meena!
mazhaiyila nananja
kozhi pola veena!
you better keep on running..
dont stop!
now back to beat yeah!

vaeliyila pona onaaiyathaan
vetiyila uttukunom
evano kudicha sarakku
bill-ah thalaiyila kattikinom

summa kidantha sanga
oothi vambila maatikinom
koli soda kudikka poyi,
andha goli thondaiyila maatikkichu

udhavaatha thappuku
adi odha vaanguna
onnume puriyama
oadithaan oliyirom

ariyaadha vayasilathaan
anjaaru peru sernthu
thirudan police aatam
appa aadinom

seiyaatha thappuku thaan
nejamana police kitta
mudiyama muttu sandhula
ippo oadurom.

piecethaan irukanum
adhu thaan da biriyani
elumbu thaan potutu
kuskava thariya nee.

chinna thandaiya pottu
keluthi viralalu
rendaiyum pidiponda.

beedi sandaiya vaangi
soda bottle la
sandhula viduvonda.

oc-la thinnuttu easy ah
 udamba yethuvomda!
police pudicha poiya solli
number plate-a
naanga maathuvomda!

pala naalu thirudan thaanda
oru naalu maatuvanu
evan thaan sonnan
avana konjam kaatuda!

thiruda thaan theriyila na
pathunga thaan theriyanunda
oada theriyila na
odhunga theriyanuda.

rammiya vachu nee
jokera poduda
thothuthita porupilla
mangatha aaduda!

seo.title: Run For Life Lyrics Biriyani
seo.description: Full Run For Life songs lyrics, Biriyani Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Yuvan, Singer(s): Gaana Bala, Psycho Unit.
seo.keywords: Biriyani, Yuvan, Gaana Bala, Psycho Unit, Run For Life full lyrics, Biriyani songs lyrics, Run For Life lyrics snippets, Run For Life WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Run For Life lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a lively and carefree vibe, encouraging listeners to enjoy life and have fun.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie?

In Biriyani, the song represents moments of joy and celebration amidst the chaos of the storyline.

Who are the artists behind this song?

The song features vocals by Gaana Bala and Psycho Unit, with music composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja.

When was the song released?

Run For Life was released on December 20, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Run For Life, the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the carefree spirit of youth and celebration. Set against the backdrop of Biriyani, it highlights moments of joy and excitement among the characters. The catchy beats and lively lyrics evoke a sense of fun, making it a perfect anthem for parties. Overall, the song conveys a message of living life to the fullest and enjoying every moment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Run For Life from Biriyani is an electrifying track that perfectly captures the essence of fun and excitement. With Gaana Bala's vibrant vocals and Psycho Unit's unique flair, this song is sure to get you moving. Yuvan's dynamic composition adds a special touch, making it a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Run For Life Lyrics Biriyani
I need a pocket biriyani, can you wait for five more minutes? Just look, a tsunami is coming.
phsyco unit
Dude, there's trouble, find a hideout or shelter. Who's in front of you? Someone is enjoying a plate of biriyani.
Stay steady, dude. You can run, but you can't hide. I'm watching you now. Run for your life, run for your life, run for your life, run for your life, yeah, run for your life.
Here we go.. here we go. Look out, like a bullet, it won't change. Do you know when the horn blows?
Even if you try to escape, there's no way out. Ah, it’s a dead end. You won't know until it’s too late. After that, you’ll regret your mistakes, dude.
Bad boys never give chances, so don’t take one because you just have none, huh!! Click click bang bang bang.
If you don’t look back at your brother, will you ask for biriyani? Don’t act like you don’t know, they will keep coming, so better watch out. Okay, take care, bye dude, peace out, come on.
In the running fox, are those two foxes? No, no, no, no.
If you get caught in prison, you’ll be in trouble, right? No, no, no, no.
Don’t just sit there, think about it, dude. Who is that guy who can’t even handle a little water? Who is that?
Hey, like a fish in the water, like a chicken in the rain! You better keep on running.. don’t stop!
Now back to the beat, yeah!
When we go out, we’ll catch the one who drinks and makes a scene. We’ll make sure to keep the bill on his head.
Just chilling, we’ll drink soda and enjoy. We went to drink soda, and that bullet got stuck in the throat.
When you run away from trouble, you won’t understand anything, and we’ll just keep running.
In this age, there are many people who gather to play thief and police, and we are playing.
It’s really trouble that can’t be handled by the police, and now we are running away from it.
It should be a piece, that’s the biriyani. You should put the bones in the trash, right?
Put a small stick and catch both the hands.
Buying beedis and throwing them in the soda bottle.
Eating in OC is easy, right? If the police catch us, we’ll just change the number plate!
Many thieves will change in one day, who said that? Just show him a little!
The thief doesn’t know, but I know. If you look, you’ll know. If you run, you’ll know.
With Rammiya, you can joke around, but don’t mess with me, dude!
